extra_protocol_comparison: successful hardware BFT observations only; no literature/legacy comparison bars

notes: No v1-v5 trend graph is generated.
BFT latency breakdown uses the median of successful hardware BFT observations plus firmware timing assumptions.
Stress graph bins raw full-evaluation_v7 telemetry into observed injection-rate windows.
Churn graph runs sim/churn_simulation.py using median hardware calibration and 5 random seeds per node count.
Extra local-path latency distribution uses raw v6 mDNS, warm-cache, and stress-success latency samples.
Protocol latency comparison is measured-only; protocol tradeoff still uses marked external context values.
Cache-hit stress figure uses raw full-evaluation_v7 telemetry and the 500-request stress summary.
